description: Bundled HRIR asset manifest for Virtuoso Audio. All HRIRs distributed under MIT-compatible or CC0 licenses.

assets.name: MIT KEMAR (Stereo)
assets.attribution: Bill Gardner and Keith Martin, MIT Media Lab
assets.notes: Classic academic HRIR; good baseline for neutral/flat headphone correction.

assets.name: HeSuVi Reference (7.1)
assets.notes: HeSuVi-compatible 14-channel target. Sourced from HeSuVi 2.0 bundled library.

assets.name: SADIE II KEMAR (7.1)
assets.attribution: University of York, SADIE II Project
assets.notes: High-resolution KEMAR measurements from University of York.

notice: These HRIR files are provided for demonstration and evaluation only. For production use, verify license compatibility with your distribution channel. See assets/legal/THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md.
